process.description: Co-id reference to process config (GenServer-style handlers)

brand.description: Co-id reference to brand style definition (uses style schema)

style.description: Co-id reference to local style definition

inbox.description: Co-id reference to message inbox costream (append-only message feed)

interface.description: Co-id reference to interface schema (standard Maia schema whose properties define accepted events with typed payloads). Every actor with an interface is LLM-callable by default.

wasm.description: WASM-based execution. $co ref to wasm config, or inline { lang, code }.

registryLabel.description: Opaque human-readable registry path (typically equals pre-seed $id). Never ref-walked; never resolved as co-id. Native module path for getActor is derived at runtime from $label, not stored.
